.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Javadoc comment to reflect a terminology change from 'download url' to 'download baseUrl'.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Changed 'download url' to 'download baseUrl' in the comment for PROPERTY_NAME_WRAPPER_URL.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17 to support the new runtime environment.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM version from 2.1.3.Final to 2.7.5.Final to align with Java 17 support and new features.
Convert the single-module project into a multi-module parent POM to manage separate components like object-controller and task-manager.
Rename the project groupId and artifactId to reflect the new organizational structure and project identity.
Update the project version to 0.2.0-SNAPSHOT to indicate a new development cycle.
Add Lombok as a project-level property to enable annotation processing for boilerplate reduction.
Add MapStruct as a project-level property to enable type-safe bean mapping.
